title: index
content:
# Welcome to TailDocs

This is the sample documentation for TailDocs.

## Features

- Markdown support
- Custom components
- Fast generation

## Links

- [Alerts](components/alert)
- [Badges](components/badge)
- [Buttons](components/button)
- And more! Check the sidebar.

title: File Component
content:
---
title: File Component
---

# File Download

Used to display a downloadable file link with icon and size.

## Syntax

`[!file text="Download Example" link="/path/to/file.zip" size="2MB"]`

### Example

[!file text="Project Archive" link="#" size="1.2 MB"]

title: Tab Component
content:
---
title: Tab Component
---

# Tabs

Tab component allows organizing content into multiple tabs.

## Syntax

Use `+++` syntax.

### Examples

+++ Tab 1
This is the content of tab 1.
+++ Tab 2
This is the content of tab 2.
+++

title: Code Component
YouTube Component
content:
---
title: YouTube Component
---

# YouTube

Embed YouTube videos.

## Syntax

`[!youtube id="video-id"]`

### Example

[!youtube id="dQw4w9WgXcQ"]

title: Badge Component
content:
---
title: Badge Component
---

# Badge

Badges are used to display small pieces of information, such as status, version, or tags.

## Syntax

Use `[!badge text="Value" variant="primary"]`.

### Examples

- Default: [!badge text="v1.0.0"]
- Primary: [!badge text="New" variant="primary"]
- Secondary: [!badge text="Draft" variant="secondary"]
- Success: [!badge text="Done" variant="success"]
- Danger: [!badge text="Error" variant="danger"]
- Warning: [!badge text="Pending" variant="warning"]
- Info: [!badge text="Info" variant="info"]
- Light: [!badge text="Light" variant="light"]
- Dark: [!badge text="Dark" variant="dark"]

### Attributes

| Attribute | Description | Default |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `text` | The text to display. | Required |
| `variant` | The color variant (primary, secondary, success, danger, warning, info, light, dark). | `primary` |
| `icon` | An icon name (e.g., `user`). | None |

### With Icon

[!badge text="User" icon="user" variant="info"]

title: Math Component
content:
---
title: Math Component
---

# Math

Mathematical formulas using KaTeX.

## Syntax

Inline: `$ ... $` or `\( ... \)`
Block: `$$ ... $$` or `\[ ... \]`

### Examples

Inline: $E=mc^2$

Block:
$$
\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
$$

title: Alert Component
content:
---
title: Alert Component
---

# Alert

Alerts (or Callouts) are used to highlight important information.

## Syntax

You can use the `!!!` syntax or the `> [!NOTE]` syntax.

### Default (Info)

!!! info
This is an information alert.
!!!

### Warning

!!! warning
This is a warning alert.
!!!

### Danger

!!! danger
This is a danger alert.
!!!

### Success

!!! success
This is a success alert.
!!!

title: Button Component
content:
---
title: Button Component
---

# Button

Buttons are used for actions or prominent links.

## Syntax

Use `[!button text="Click Me" link="/"]`.

### Examples

- Default: [!button text="Primary" link="#"]
- Secondary: [!button text="Secondary" variant="secondary"]
- Outline: [!button text="Outline" variant="outline"]
- Danger: [!button text="Danger" variant="danger"]

### With Icon

[!button text="Search" icon="search" variant="outline"]

title: Panel Component
content:
---
title: Panel Component
---

# Panel

Panels are used to group related content, often with columns.

## Syntax

`:::panel`

### Examples

:::panel
#### Panel Content
This is inside a panel.
:::

title: Column Component
content:
---
title: Column Component
---

# Column

Columns allow you to create multi-column layouts inside Panels or Containers.

## Syntax

Use `:::column` syntax.

### Examples

:::panel
:::column
### Left Column
This is the left column content.
:::
:::column
### Right Column
This is the right column content.
:::
:::

title: Mermaid Component
Reference Component
content:
---
title: Reference Component
---

# Reference

Used to create links to other pages or external sites with an icon.

## Syntax

`[!ref text="Link Text" link="url"]`

### Example

[!ref text="GitHub Repository" link="https://github.com/"]

title: Embed Component
content:
---
title: Embed Component
---

# Embed

The Embed component allows you to embed external content (like iframes) safely.

## Syntax

`[!embed src="https://example.com" height="500"]`

### Example

[!embed src="https://example.com" height="400"]

title: Image Component
content:
---
title: Image Component
---

# Image

Enhanced images support custom attributes like width, height, and alignment using generic attribute syntax `{width=...}`.

## Syntax

`![Alt Text](url){width=300}`

### Example

![Sample Image](https://via.placeholder.com/600x400){width=400}

title: Icon Component
content:
---
title: Icon Component
---

# Icon

The Icon component allows you to insert Flaticon UIcons inline.

## Syntax

`[!icon name="home"]` or inline `:icon-home:` if supported.

### Examples

- Home: [!icon name="home"]
- User: [!icon name="user"]
- Settings: [!icon name="settings"]

You can use any valid UIcons name available in the linked CSS.
